user.title: Smart Oil Gauge
user.description: Enter your Smart Oil Gauge (Connected Consumer Fuel) account credentials. These are the same email and password you use to log into app.smartoilgauge.com.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your Smart Oil Gauge account credentials at app.smartoilgauge.com.

abort.already_configured: Smart Oil Gauge is already configured.
